name: Silence
summary: Silence beckons players into the vast expanse of space, a desolate canvas where the echoes of the cosmos mingle with the unnerving stillness. Amidst this emptiness, shadows dance with unseen horrors, lurking monsters waiting to pounce on the unwary. Piloting their spacecraft, players embark on a perilous journey, navigating the void while battling these cosmic terrors.
